description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a Mediterranean-inspired design, featuring a prominent red-tiled hip roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a central entryway with a stone-clad chimney, a covered porch supported by columns, and a balcony above the entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged, with a set of three on the upper floor and additional windows on the ground level. The property is surrounded by a green lawn, with pergola structures on both sides—one covering a driveway or carport and the other shading a patio or garden area. The house also features a small tree in the front yard and a mix of open and covered outdoor spaces, enhancing its curb appeal and functionality.
description: A two-story Mediterranean-style house with a red-tiled hip roof, white walls, central stone chimney, and pergola-covered outdoor areas on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, stone chimney, balcony, pergolas, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the red-tiled roof and the pergola structure extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the roof and the back pergola, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the side pergola, balcony, and the integration of outdoor spaces with the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a covered porch, stone chimney, steps, and columns supporting a balcony above.
